heading: Omitted
label: 2561 to 2563 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 2561, , , , required Secretary of Health, Education, and Welfare, not later than six months after , to report on purposes, administration, and effectiveness of special programs for students from disadvantaged backgrounds under sections 1070d and 1070d–1 of this title and High School Equivalency Program and College Assistance Migrant Program authorized under and provided funding requirements for fiscal year 1977 for the programs authorized under .Pub. L. 94–482, title V, § 52190 Stat. 2238section 873 of title 29section 873 of title 29Oct. 12, 1976October 12, 1976Section 2562, , , , S.Res. 4, 1977, required Secretary of Health, Education, and Welfare to conduct a study of need to reorganize the Education Division and transmit a report to Committee on Human Resources of Senate and Committee on Education and Labor of House of Representatives, no later than .Pub. L. 94–482, title V, § 52290 Stat. 2238Oct. 12, 1976June 30, 1977Section 2563, , , ; , (31)(A), , , required Commissioner of Education to carry out a study of extent to which sex discrimination and sex stereotyping existed in certain vocational rehabilitation programs, and of progress made to reduce or eliminate such discrimination and stereotyping, and report to Congress results of study with recommendations by . Section also required National Institute of Education to undertake a thorough evaluation and study of vocational education programs, including such programs conducted by States and such programs conducted under specified laws, and made an interim report to President and to Congress not later than , and a final report to President and to Congress not later than .Pub.
